name: Coffee Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the vegetables in the cooker.
2. Add the pot roast, sprinkling with salt and pepper.
3. Stir in the canned tomatoes and liquids.
4. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours or until tender.
5. If desired, thicken the sauce by stirring flour into a water base.
